name: Colombia
style_of_play: Attacking football with flair in wide areas, quick combinations, and emphasis on creative midfield play.
weaknesses: can lose shape when chasing games
tactical_summary: Attack through Diaz and James in half-spaces with overlapping fullbacks; midfield double pivot provides balance while the front three interchange positions.
why_it_matters: Colombia's flair and South American pedigree give them upset potential against any top seed on their day.
